## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (or justified why not)
- [ ] `docs/` updated if this changes user-visible behaviour
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `Unreleased` for user-visible changes
- [ ] No new lint warnings (`make lint`)
